contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Fix Telegram bot dropping replies (400 message thread not found)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/45
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed via EC2 logs + direct reproduction: /chat-blocking returned 200 but sendMessage 400'd ('message thread not found'), so answers never reached Telegram — looked like the bot responding halfway then going silent. Root cause: echoing message_thread_id for reply-threads / General-topic ids that aren't valid forum topics for sendMessage. Fix (truesight_autopilot#45): only route by message_thread_id when is_topic_message is true; on a failed threaded send, retry without the thread so replies always land. 19 unit tests pass; deployed to prod EC2; adapter restarted and healthy.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/45
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
